mapper.sql: id, site_name, site_address, site_intro, site_notice, create_site_time, record_number, author_avatar, tourist_avatar, site_author, article_cover, github, email, comment_check, email_notice, websocket_url, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
select
distinct
'true' as QUERYID,
,
from t_site_config
order by ${orderByClause}

select
distinct
'true' as QUERYID,
from t_site_config
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into t_site_config (id, site_name, site_address, site_intro, site_notice, create_site_time, record_number, author_avatar, tourist_avatar, site_author, article_cover, github, email, comment_check, email_notice, websocket_url, create_time, update_time, about_me) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{siteName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{siteAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{siteIntro,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{siteNotice,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createSiteTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{recordNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authorAvatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{touristAvatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{siteAuthor,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{articleCover,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{github,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{commentCheck,jdbcType=BIT}, #{emailNotice,jdbcType=BIT}, #{websocketUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{aboutMe,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

insert into t_site_config
id,
site_name,
site_address,
site_intro,
site_notice,
create_site_time,
record_number,
author_avatar,
tourist_avatar,
site_author,
article_cover,
github,
email,
comment_check,
email_notice,
websocket_url,
create_time,
update_time,
about_me,

#{siteName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{siteAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{siteIntro,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{siteNotice,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createSiteTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

#{websocketUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{aboutMe,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update t_site_config
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
site_name = #{record.siteName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
site_address = #{record.siteAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
site_intro = #{record.siteIntro,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
site_notice = #{record.siteNotice,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_site_time = #{record.createSiteTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
record_number = #{record.recordNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
author_avatar = #{record.authorAvatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tourist_avatar = #{record.touristAvatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
site_author = #{record.siteAuthor,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
article_cover = #{record.articleCover,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
github = #{record.github,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{record.email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
comment_check = #{record.commentCheck,jdbcType=BIT},
email_notice = #{record.emailNotice,jdbcType=BIT},
websocket_url = #{record.websocketUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
about_me = #{record.aboutMe,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},

update t_site_config set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, site_name = #{record.siteName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, site_address = #{record.siteAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, site_intro = #{record.siteIntro,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, site_notice = #{record.siteNotice,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_site_time = #{record.createSiteTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, record_number = #{record.recordNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, author_avatar = #{record.authorAvatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tourist_avatar = #{record.touristAvatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, site_author = #{record.siteAuthor,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, article_cover = #{record.articleCover,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, github = #{record.github,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{record.email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, comment_check = #{record.commentCheck,jdbcType=BIT}, email_notice = #{record.emailNotice,jdbcType=BIT}, websocket_url = #{record.websocketUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, about_me = #{record.aboutMe,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}

update t_site_config
site_name = #{siteName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
site_address = #{siteAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
site_intro = #{siteIntro,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
site_notice = #{siteNotice,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_site_time = #{createSiteTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
record_number = #{recordNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
author_avatar = #{authorAvatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tourist_avatar = #{touristAvatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
site_author = #{siteAuthor,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

github = #{github,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
comment_check = #{commentCheck,jdbcType=BIT},
email_notice = #{emailNotice,jdbcType=BIT},
websocket_url = #{websocketUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
about_me = #{aboutMe,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
